title: vehicle-colors
markdown:
List of vehicle colors

- [Metallic](#metallic)
- [Matte](#matte)
- [Metals](#metals)
- [Unnamed Colors](#unnamed-colors)

	.colors {
		display: grid;
		grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, 25%);
	}

	.color {
		padding: 5px;
		margin: 5px;

		border: 1px solid #333;
		background-color: #fafafa;

		position: relative;
	}

	.color span {
		display: block;
		text-align: center;
		bottom: 5px;
		left: 5px;
		right: 5px;
		word-wrap: break-word;
	}

	.model img {
		max-height: 150px;
	}
